title: Show HN: Why our team moved from Cursor to Windsurf
snippet: We documented the migration. Composer agent mode replaced our Cursor chat workflow with fewer context-window blowouts.
author: hn_dev_carol

title: Cursor 0.45 release notes look strong
snippet: The 0.45 release closes the gap with Windsurf on agent mode. Tab autocomplete remains best-in-class for Cursor.
author: hn_dev_dan
